rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same material, confirmable issues: the ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup stubs (True fields) are premature and should be removed, and IsUnipotent should be deferred. The only disagreement is Review 2's claim that AffineAlgGroup should be unbundled per a roadmap directive at line 247 — a project-convention claim not verifiable from the diff alone. Acting on either review would produce essentially equivalent PRs after the core fixes.
